result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Product detail page on Amazon for a Phantoscope pillow; purchase box visible with stock and price.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Phantoscope Memory Foam Pillow for Sleeping, Shredded Memory Foam Pillow Cooling Gel for Hot Sleepers, Adjustable Firm Bed Pillows with Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover, King Size, 1 Pack, Gift Package”
“King Size”
“Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover”
“4.3”
“In Stock”
“Buy new: VND 964,514”
selected_candidate:
Phantoscope Memory Foam Pillow, king size, with bamboo cover & cotton cover.
constraint_evidence:
- bamboo memory foam pillow: supported (title says “Memory Foam Pillow” and “Bamboo Cover”)
- washable cover: not_visible (no explicit washable/washer-safe text visible)
- available in king size: supported (title includes “King Size”)
- on Amazon: supported (Amazon page visible and URL/title are Amazon)
- product is a pillow: supported
- price visible: supported (VND 964,514)
- rating/stars visible: supported (4.3 stars, 1,138 ratings)
- stock/availability visible: supported (“In Stock”)
action_target:
send message to user: “[EXIT]”
success_signals:
User-facing exit message sent; trajectory ends without further browsing.
failure_signals:
If the agent was expected to continue searching, exiting now would stop progress before confirming washable cover.
uncertainty:
Washable cover is not explicitly shown in the screenshot; only “Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover” is visible, so the key filter remains unverified.

args.task: navigate: Find a bamboo memory foam pillow on Amazon with a washable cover and available in king size.

evidence.claim: The trajectory reaches an Amazon product detail page for the Phantoscope pillow, and the high-detail screenshot shows the product is a king-size bamboo memory-foam pillow with stock and price visible.
The same high-detail evidence does not show explicit washable/washer-safe cover text; it only shows “Bamboo Cover & Cotton Cover,” so the washable-cover requirement remains unverified.
The run ends immediately after sending the exit message, with no further search or verification step after the washable constraint remained uncertain.
There is no comparable validated successful run returned for this task, so no replay-and-diff success precedent was available.

args.expected_behavior: Continue verifying the product against all hard constraints before exiting, especially that the cover is explicitly washable/washer-safe in addition to being bamboo, memory foam, and king size.
args.actual_behavior: The agent selected a product whose page visibly confirmed bamboo, memory foam, king size, price, and stock, but did not verify an explicit washable-cover claim and then exited the task.
args.regression_rule: Do not exit after finding a partially matching product; if any hard constraint remains unverified in the visible evidence, keep browsing or inspect the detail page until the constraint is explicitly confirmed or ruled out.

suggested_followups.label: Show evidence
suggested_followups.message: Display the final product-page evidence and whether the washable condition was explicitly visible.

suggested_followups.label: Search alternative
suggested_followups.message: Find another king-size bamboo memory foam pillow with explicit washable-cover text.
